invariant.consistency.required-freshness: Observed state meets its declared freshness contract.
Forbidden context does not cross the selected boundary.
invariant.context.required-continuity.v1: Required context remains equivalent across its declared path.
invariant.contract.schema-compatible.v1: Producer and consumer schema ranges overlap.
invariant.effect.at-most-once.v1: A logical effect becomes durable no more than its allowed count.
invariant.identity.workflow-correlatable: One logical workflow remains correlatable across boundaries.
invariant.observability.required-linkage: Required execution linkage exists across boundaries.
invariant.ordering.read-after-visibility: Dependent reads occur only after producer state becomes visible.
invariant.performance.work-amplification: Logical work remains within its expected amplification bound.
invariant.privacy.prohibited-capture.v1: Prohibited sensitive values are not captured or exported.
invariant.resource.capacity-bounded.v1: Required resource capacity remains within declared limits.
